name: Karia Sanchez
text: Setting the primary AI tool asks what tools I use and lets me select multiple — it doesn't feel like a 'primary' or 'secondary.' (Severity: Med)

name: Karia Sanchez
text: After prompting my role and day-to-day tasks, 'Find AI for work' found good ways to use AI — but when I navigated away and back, the results were gone. It'd be great to have a history to refer back to instead of re-typing the role. (Severity: Med)

name: Karia Sanchez
text: The tile is labeled 'ways to learn' vs 'Other ways to learn' — otherwise the correct tiles open. (Severity: Low)

name: Karia Sanchez
text: The streak & XP pills at the top of the screen aren't clickable, though the bottom 'Your stats' section is.

name: Karia Sanchez
text: I clicked into a lesson and Today's Pick, scrolled so the % bar moved, then went back to Home — no lessons showed as 'paused' or 'in progress.' Not being able to see started lessons to refer back to would be frustrating. (Severity: High)

name: Karia Sanchez
text: The Discovery use cases populate but aren't specific to my role — use cases relevant to my role without having to type something first would be more user-friendly. (Severity: Med)

name: Karia Sanchez
text: Generating lesson content is a bit slow — could easily get distracted while waiting.

name: Karia Sanchez
text: Pause & resume: I started 4+ lessons but the only one that shows as paused (in notifications / that I can resume) is the narrated lesson. And resuming returned me to the same lesson but not the same spot — I was on Scene 4 of 6 and it returned me to Scene 1. (Severity: High)

name: Karia Sanchez
text: I don't see the refine/regenerate option in my lesson. (Severity: Low)

name: Karia Sanchez
text: For Project Quest you have to select the level as project quest before starting the lesson, rather than starting the lesson and choosing Project Quest — though this format makes sense to me. (Severity: Low)

name: Karia Sanchez
text: The guided tour appeared right after I finished configuration/scoring; the first steps just showed in the middle of the screen, and only the last two steps moved to the area they were addressing.
